verses.2: “How long will you speak these things?
verses.4: If your children have sinned against him,
verses.5: If you want to seek God diligently,
verses.6: If you were pure and upright,
verses.9: (For we are but of yesterday, and know nothing,
verses.10: Shall they not teach you, tell you,
verses.11: “Can the papyrus grow up without mire?
verses.12: While it is yet in its greenness, not cut down,
verses.13: So are the paths of all who forget God.
verses.15: He will lean on his house, but it will not stand.
verses.16: He is green before the sun.
verses.17: His roots are wrapped around the rock pile.
verses.18: If he is destroyed from his place,
verses.19: Behold, this is the joy of his way.
verses.20: “Behold, God will not cast away a blameless man,
verses.21: He will still fill your mouth with laughter,
verses.22: Those who hate you will be clothed with shame.
